summary: Completed comprehensive testing of wealth distribution calculation and pie chart rendering bug fix. Verified that frontend-generated IDs are preserved in backend, simulation produces correct non-zero distribution percentages, and Results Dashboard displays accurate pie chart data.
passed_tests: Backend: ID preservation - frontend UUIDs correctly preserved in backend
Backend: Non-zero distribution percentages (51.43% and 48.57% in test scenario)
Backend: Total percentages sum to exactly 100%
Backend: Edge case with 0 purchase price handled correctly
Frontend: Full 3-step scenario creation wizard (Assets → Family → Distribution)
Frontend: Results Dashboard loads with correct data
Frontend: Pie chart displays non-zero percentages (Alice 49.81%, Bob 50.19%)
Frontend: Total Estate Value correctly calculated (1,060,000)
Frontend: No 'No valid distribution data available' message
Integration: Asset/member IDs properly referenced in allocations
Integration: Simulation engine correctly matches IDs across assets, members, and allocations
